rationale: Both reviews correctly flag the same material documentation mismatches (ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup docstrings and unipotentRadical_trivial' overclaiming against their : True stubs). Review 2's additional, clearly grounded finding on AlgPoints (docstring claims k-points of an affine algebraic group, but the def is an unrelated generic over Semiring/CommSemiring) would produce a strictly better final PR under the documentation rubric.
